meaning: National Union of Students(英国)全国学生联合会
examples: Owain James is the president of the National Union of Students (NUS).
NUS statistics show that over 40% of students are forced to work during term time and the figure increases to 90% during vacating periods.
The agreement even seems to require NUS to reimburse Yale for the salaries of Yale professors who will teach in Singapore.
The forms will be collected by the NUS and passed to local electoral registration officials.
The new Yale-NUS campus is expected to comprise three residential colleges with about 330 students each.
